qa_pairs.question: What kind of network access is provided by the default security group for virtual machines (VMs) in OpenStack?
qa_pairs.answer: The default security group allows a VM access out to the internet, for example, to download operating system upgrades or package installations. However, it does not allow another machine to access the VM, except for other VMs belonging to the same default security group.

qa_pairs.question: Why is it recommended not to remove rules from the default security group in OpenStack?
qa_pairs.answer: It is recommended not to remove rules from the default security group because doing so may cause problems when creating new virtual machines (VMs).
